title: cyanus angustifolius
intro: Cyanus angustifolius, also known as cornflower, is a perennial herb belonging to the daisy family that is native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. The medicinal properties of cornflower are attributed to its high content of flavonoids, alkaloids, and essential oils, which have anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of cornflower include reducing inflammation, relieving headaches and eye strain, and soothing digestive issues. Herbal preparations of cornflower can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
